commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9a56e36c6507cf7b9b11185781a5e3c5b5a3cbbc)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds structured Doctor health findings and dry-run repair effects for extra gateway services, preserves the legacy gateway-service Doctor path for real cleanup, and updates Doctor lint/contribution ordering docs and tests.

PR surface: Source -19, Tests +639, Docs +2. Total +622 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the PR emits warning findings for active extra gateway services and wires those findings into Doctor lint, whose exit code is based on selected findings. I did not run a live service scenario because this review is read-only and local tests/CLI runs could create artifacts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are a protected-label PR, a stacked base, contributor real-behavior proof, and a compatibility policy choice rather than a narrow repair-only task.

target.title: Doctor: expose extra gateway service findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes the extra gateway service doctor checks as structured health findings.
- Adds dry-run repair effects for restart/retry actions that doctor already knows how to describe.
- Keeps the existing `doctor:gateway-services` legacy run path authoritative for real normal `doctor` / `doctor --fix` behavior.
- Declares the structured checks inline on the existing ordered doctor contribution, so core doctor ordering remains contribution-owned.

This is intentionally the gateway services slice from the doctor repair stack. It does not change gateway startup, provider config, or plugin health behavior.

## Stack

Stacked on #86627, current base head `bd1000b409d`. The only new gateway commit in this PR is signed head `9a56e36c65`; the gateway delta is 5 files.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec vitest run --project commands src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts` (33 tests)
- `pnpm exec vitest run --project unit-fast src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts` (39 tests)

Note: an earlier parallel proof attempt hit a fresh-worktree `pnpm install` directory race; the commands above were rerun sequentially after `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` completed cleanly.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
